emails.subject: Tammi
emails.body: Scott, Tammi told me that she has chosen not to sign the Employment Contract. I understand her issues. Even before she informed me of her decision I was thinking that we should support her for mid-year promotion to Director. I would like to get your thoughts on this. Frank

emails.subject: Tammi
emails.body: Scott, Tammi told me that she has chosen not to sign the Employment Contract. I understand her issues. Even before she informed me of her decision I was thinking that we should support her for mid-year promotion to Director. I would like to get your thoughts on this. Frank

emails.subject: Tammi
emails.body: Scott, Tammi told me that she has chosen not to sign the Employment Contract. I understand her issues. Even before she informed me of her decision I was thinking that we should support her for mid-year promotion to Director. I would like to get your thoughts on this. Frank

emails.subject: Re: Tammi
emails.body: Re: Tammi I definately support a promotion. I have not given up on the contract, although I have not figured out how to make it more palatable for her while ensuring she is committed to Enron. Scott Frank W Vickers@ENRON 05/15/2001 02:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Tammi
emails.body: I think that a mid year promotion with a year end bonus will get her comfortable with the system and then she will sign an employment agreement going into next year. Frank Scott Neal@ECT 05/15/2001 03:15 PM
